html:
Exclusive to:

Dark Tatters are a crafting item within both the Hamlet DLC and Don't Starve Together. In Hamlet, they are obtained from the Ancient Herald, spawned in during the Aporkalypse.

In Hamlet, Dark Tatters are used to craft and refuel the Vortex Cloak, repairing 100% of its Durability. It may also be used to craft the Nightmarish Bird Whistle.


Trivia

  • In the Shipwrecked DLC, Dark Tatters can be offered to the Volcano Altar of Snackrifice during Dry Season to appease the Volcano for 32 day segments, or 2 in-game days. This may be a suitable alternative use.
  • Its name may be a reference to Dark Matters.


Gallery

  • Wickerbottom with five Dark Tatters and the Vortex Cloak Blueprint.

Tóm tắt

Dark Tatters là một vật phẩm chế tạo trong cả Hamlet DLC và Don't Starve Together. Ở Hamlet, chúng thu được từ Sứ giả Cổ đại, xuất hiện trong Kỳ tận thế.

'''Dark Tatters''' are a crafting item within both the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC and [[Don't Starve Together]]. In Hamlet, they are obtained from the [[Ancient Herald]], spawned in during the [[Aporkalypse]]. 

In Hamlet, Dark Tatters are used to craft and refuel the [[Vortex Cloak]], repairing 100% of its Durability. It may also be used to craft the [[Nightmarish Bird Whistle]].


=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Dark Tatters
|count1 = 5
|item2 = Night Armor
|tool = Blueprint
|result = Vortex Cloak}}

{{Recipe
|item2 = Bird Whistle
|item1 = Dark Tatters
|count1 = 2
|tool = Hogus Porkusator
|result = Nightmarish Bird Whistle}}
== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Dark Tatters can be offered to the [[Volcano Altar of Snackrifice]] during [[Seasons/Dry|Dry Season]] to appease the [[Volcano]] for 32 day segments, or 2 in-game days. This may be a suitable alternative use.
* Its name may be a reference to [[Wikipedia:Dark Matters|Dark Matters]].
